job_description:
Job Title: Entry level AI Engineer

Responsibilities:
- Build and set up machine learning models for Natural Language Processing (NLP). [cite: 116]
- Work with AI models like BERT and GPT to handle different tasks. [cite: 116]
- Optimize models to ensure they respond quickly and efficiently. [cite: 116]
- Collaborate with the team to integrate AI into real applications. [cite: 116]

Requirements:
- Comfortable writing code in Python. [cite: 116]
- Familiarity with AI tools like PyTorch or Hugging Face. [cite: 116]
- Basic understanding of how computers process text (Arabic AI/AraBERT is a plus). [cite: 116]
- Ability to write clean and organized code. [cite: 116]

candidate_cv.career_overview: Accomplished Senior IT Engineer with demonstrated ability to analyze business requirements and create effective technical solutions applicable to diverse industries. [cite: 38] Serves as strategic partner to senior management, identifying business requirements, aligning IT assets with company goals and making key strategic contributions. [cite: 39] An experienced Network Engineer with excellent troubleshooting skills. [cite: 40]

education.degree: Master of Science: Master of Information Systems

responsibilities: Provides hardware and software specifications to users based on application and business needs and anticipated growth, installs new servers, routers, firewall and maintains the entire infrastructure. [cite: 56]
Recommends changes to improve systems and network configurations, and determine hardware or software requirements related to proposed changes. [cite: 57]
Performs troubleshooting for complex hardware, software and network problems. [cite: 58]
Defines procedures for monitoring and evaluates, diagnoses, and establishes work plan to resolve system issues. [cite: 59]
Manages multiple projects and work as a project leader and as a project team member to help complete the jobs on time. [cite: 60]
Researches, evaluates and recommends new and more efficient software and hardware products. [cite: 61]
Maintains and administers computing environments including computer hardware, systems software, applications software, and all configurations. [cite: 62]
Manages major upgrades of systems and/or relocation offices and facilities including assessment of requirements through to implementation and testing of solutions. [cite: 63]
Manages data backup, availability, and recommends data recovery solutions. [cite: 64]
Install and manage Local Area Network, Servers, firewalls, routers, switches, VPN connection, Remote access and security components. [cite: 67]
Perform daily administration functions such as add/change users, check backups, virus detection, signature updates, intrusion prevention, monitoring, and performance tuning. [cite: 68]
Deploy, maintain, upgrade and update VMWare, Microsoft Hyper-V servers. [cite: 69]
Maintain and update company's websites, Server's firmware, patches and service packs. [cite: 70]
Manage backup, image of servers and workstations and disaster recovery architecture. [cite: 71]
Modify user accounts, password, content filtering, rights and securities. [cite: 72]
Maintain SQL databases, create, modify and optimize as necessary to increase productivity. [cite: 73]
Organize and optimize network directory and file layout for ease of use and management. [cite: 74]
Serves as a technical resource to the HIMS function in other centers throughout the region if needed. [cite: 75]
Performs other duties & accepts responsibility as assigned. [cite: 76]
Provided annual savings through implementation of automated data system utilizing latest technologies. [cite: 77]
Responsible for HIM operations involving continuous evaluation and re-engineering of applicable processes and organizational design based on current and new client needs. [cite: 78]
Ensures the efficient day-to-day operations of the HIMS departments within a cluster. [cite: 79]
Participates in the Research, development & implementation of HIMS policies & procedures, operations & automated systems providing medical information to client staff & providers. [cite: 81]
Served as Project Manager for GNC Operations Center and on several central offices build out projects in Los Angeles Counties. [cite: 87]
Acted as consultant to senior executives of GNC to accommodate Y2K network deployment. [cite: 88]
Successfully established relationships with key customers that included Verizon Wireless and others. [cite: 90]
Managed functions that provided field engineering, logistics support and system assessment worldwide. [cite: 91]
Marketed support products that resulted in increased revenue while positioning organization for further growth. [cite: 92]
Effectively led delivery of support programs while increasing sales by 17% and building strong customer relationships. [cite: 93]
Designs, plans and implements Microsoft and Novell Networks. [cite: 94]
Setup and configures Microsoft, Novell and Linux, Citrix, Terminal, WEB and Blackberry Servers. [cite: 95]
Setup, configure, administer and maintain CISCO, Juniper, Sonicwall and other manufacturer switches, routers and Firewalls. [cite: 96]
Implements new technology and network strategies. [cite: 97]
Managed overall optimum performance of the WAN/LAN and security infrastructure. [cite: 98]
Performs automation projects. [cite: 99]
Managed Healthcare clients, installing and maintaining medical application programs. [cite: 100]
